title: Request Revision
subtitle: Song for {name}
notFound: Order not found or not eligible for revision
notesDescription: Describe in detail what is wrong with the song. Be specific about pronunciation, lyrics, or any other issue.
notesPlaceholder: Ex: The name Maria is being pronounced 'Maria' but should be 'Ma-ri-a'. Also the word 'love' in the second verse is incorrect...
notesRequired: ⚠️ REQUIRED FIELD: Please describe what needs to be corrected in the song!
infoDescription: We will analyze your request within 48 hours. If the error was due to incorrect information you provided, a fee of $19 will be charged. Otherwise, the revision is free.
infoLine1: We will analyze your request within
infoLine2: . If the error was due to
successDescription: We received your revision request. We will analyze it and send a new version within 48 hours.
audioOption: Prefer speaking over typing? Record an audio (up to 5 min) and it will be automatically transcribed to the text field above:
melodyPreferenceDescription: If you liked the current rhythms, keep the melody. If you did not like the rhythms, choose to generate 2 new rhythms.
melodyKeepCurrentDescription: Use this if you liked the current rhythms: we will only revise the lyrics and keep the current melodies
melodySuggestNew: I did not like the current rhythms (generate 2 new ones)
melodySuggestNewDescription: We will revise the lyrics based on your request and generate 2 new rhythms in the same music genre. The old rhythms will not be kept
whatsappDescription: We need your WhatsApp to send the new adjusted song and, if necessary, discuss payment.
queuePosition: You are #{position} in the revision queue
confirmDescription: Review your request before submitting. Are you sure you want to submit?
songVersionDescription: Listen to both versions and select the one you like best. The revision will be based on this version.
songVersionWarning: ⚠️ Only 1 song will be kept (the best one, which will be corrected). The other will be deleted.
songVersionRequired: Please select which version you prefer
additionalNotesPlaceholder: Write here what you forgot to mention...
originalTextTitle: Click here to see what you wrote in the order
alreadyRequestedDescription: You have already submitted a revision request for this order. We are working on your corrected song and you will receive it by email soon.
submitWarning: You must click the button below to submit the form
microphoneError: Error accessing microphone. Please check permissions.
